name: Brian W. Kernighan
bio: Canadian computer scientist who co-authored The C Programming Language and contributed to Unix and AWK.

name: Alan A. A. Donovan
bio: Software engineer on the Go team at Google and co-author of The Go Programming Language.

name: Martin Kleppmann
bio: Researcher in distributed systems at the University of Cambridge and author on data-intensive applications.

name: N. K. Jemisin
bio: American speculative fiction writer and three-time Hugo Award winner.

name: Frank Herbert
bio: American science fiction author best known for the Dune saga.

name: Andy Weir
bio: American novelist known for scientifically grounded science fiction including The Martian.

name: Cixin Liu
bio: Chinese science fiction writer and Hugo Award winner, author of the Remembrance of Earth's Past trilogy.

name: Arkady Martine
bio: American speculative fiction author and historian, two-time Hugo Award winner.

name: Adrian Tchaikovsky
bio: British author of fantasy and science fiction, winner of the Arthur C. Clarke Award.

name: Dan Simmons
bio: American author of science fiction, horror, and fantasy, best known for the Hyperion Cantos.

name: Vernor Vinge
bio: American science fiction author and retired professor, multiple Hugo Award winner.

name: Andrew Hunt
bio: American software engineer and co-author of The Pragmatic Programmer.

name: David Thomas
bio: British software consultant and co-author of The Pragmatic Programmer.

name: Alex Petrov
bio: Software engineer and author specializing in database storage engines and distributed systems.

name: Alex Xu
bio: Software engineer and author known for the System Design Interview series.

name: Betsy Beyer
bio: Technical writer at Google and lead editor of the Site Reliability Engineering book.

name: Matt Butcher
bio: Software engineer and author working on cloud-native infrastructure and Go.

name: Matt Farina
bio: Software engineer and co-author of Go in Practice, focused on cloud-native development.

name: Becky Chambers
bio: American science fiction author known for the Wayfarers series and cozy speculative fiction.
top_work: The Long Way to a Small, Angry Planet

name: Ann Leckie
bio: American science fiction author whose debut Ancillary Justice swept the major genre awards.

name: William Kennedy
bio: Software engineer and trainer specializing in Go, author of Go in Action.

name: Ursula K. Le Guin
bio: American author of speculative fiction and essays, multiple Hugo and Nebula winner.

name: Isaac Asimov
bio: American writer and professor of biochemistry; prolific science fiction author.
